conflict: The data chip forces the crew's individual secrets into shared space — the foundational pact of mutual unknowing breaks
consequence: The crew fractures; trust is damaged not by betrayal but by exposure; the family that worked by not-knowing has been forced into knowing
must_land_beats: The chip contains: a photo connecting a woman with Faye's face, an ISSP-postured man, Jet's precinct, and syndicate graffiti Spike recognizes — all in one frame
Medical records showing Faye's biometric signature authorizing prescriptions seven years after she was frozen
Partial ISSP case file connecting Jet's precinct to Spike's logistics routes through a redacted informant
Ed maps the connections: one family — informant husband, courier wife, stolen identity — linking three Bebop crew members
The worst argument they have ever had: Jet accuses Spike, Spike accuses Jet, Faye turns fury on both for treating a dead woman's name as operational detail
The argument exposes the Bebop's foundational pact of strategic unknowing — and breaks it
pressure_source: The data chip forces the crew's individual secrets into shared space — the foundational pact of mutual unknowing breaks
state_shift: The crew fractures; trust is damaged not by betrayal but by exposure; the family that worked by not-knowing has been forced into knowing
